claims.text: A designed two-component memory field m=(m1,m2) is causal and erasable: ablating the coupling (lam=0) removes the effect exactly.
Temporal order (N->c vs c->N) is stored in m-=m1-m2 and made causally readable via the attractant channel; it collapses ~70x/73x under lam_minus ablation and is absent on the uptake axis.

The originally reported high-dimensional continuous history storage was an artefact of a 20-47x history-amplitude mismatch and a replicate-leaking row-LOO decoder; grouped leave-history-out reduces the published p2 R2 from 0.57 to 0.19.
A minimal de-saturating writing change (C1c) yields two prospectively decodable history coordinates at rest (h1,h2 both ~0.94 held-out).
Causal response remains ~1-D: h2 is not causally expressed (mean-transplant -0.04; in-place 0.30; response effdim ~1.0-1.1).
h2 is carried by a frame-free value-dispersion statistic (not a resolvable geometric pattern, not lab-frame): frame-free decode 0.73, lab-frame edge collapses to -0.77 under translation.
SMC-01's h2 'turnover collapse' was a single-family, underpowered realization; between-family variance is high (36xxx crashes, 37xxx retains).
The h2-loss is NOT diffusion/templating homogenization (ablations valid but negligible on decode; dispersion grows) and NOT dilution (new material inherits h2 = old, 0.77/0.77 via passive Mf+=g*m).
h2 does NOT survive deep turnover on a sealed family: at M=0.21 held-out h2 = -0.02 (95% CI [-2.17,0.93]); new-material h2 = 0.28; all four seed families fail.
h1 (cumulative-experience coordinate) is prospectively decodable and survives deep constituent turnover: M=0.21 h1 R2 = 0.93 (95% CI [0.83,1.00]), 48/48 viable.
h1 is causally expressed and transplantable: mean-transplant into a fresh body R2=0.61; in-place memory-isolated 0.50; memory-inert control collapses it.
h1 exceeds trivial body baselines especially after turnover: memory 0.93 vs size+mass 0.64 at M=0.21 (incremental ~+0.29). h1 remains a low-dimensional engineered cumulative integrator.
Individuation / identity / lineage / reproduction / genome are NOT supported on this architecture.
The Particle-Dynamics substrate is globally incapable of multidimensional organizational memory.
